locations.name: 阿雷納爾火山
locations.summary: 阿雷納爾火山（Arenal）是哥斯達黎加的活火山，位於阿拉胡埃拉省首府阿拉胡埃拉市西北約90公里，是哥斯達黎加最活躍的火山和全世界十大活躍火山之一，海拔高度至少1,633米，火山口闊140米。 參考文獻 外部連結 Arenal Volca…

locations.name: 喬治·紐博爾德·勞倫斯
locations.summary: 喬治·紐博爾德·勞倫斯（George Newbold Lawrence，1806年10月20日 – 1895年11月17日）是一位美國商人和業餘鳥類學家。 他曾為斯賓塞·富勒頓·貝爾德及約翰·卡辛進行太平鳥類調查，他們三人在1860年出版…

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Cinnamon becard
relations.evidence: The cinnamon becard (Pachyramphus cinnamomeus) is a passerine bird in the family Tityridae, the tityras, becards, and allies. It is found in Mexico, in every Central American country except El Salvador, and in Colombia, Ecuador, and Venezuela.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

relations.subject: Cinnamon becard
relations.evidence: The cinnamon becard (Pachyramphus cinnamomeus) is a passerine bird in the family Tityridae, the tityras, becards, and allies. It is found in Mexico, in every Central American country except El Salvador, and in Colombia, Ecuador, and Venezuela.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

relations.subject: Cinnamon becard
relations.evidence: | title =Birds of Venezuela | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =second | date =2003 | location =Princeton NJ | pages =646 | language =English }} The cinnamon becard inhabits the interior and edges of evergreen forest and secondary forest in the tropical and lower subtropical zones. It also occurs in somewhat open woodlands, riparian areas, clearings with tall trees, and coastally in mangroves. In elevation it ranges overall from sea level mostly to . It reaches in northern Central America, in Costa Rica, in Colombia, in Ecuador, and in Venezuela
